name: Orthobullets Orthopaedic Topic Taxonomy
description: Case-oriented topic clusters mirroring subspecialty hub hierarchy (G58). Same spine concept IDs as ABOS lens with Orthobullets-style section navigation.
intended_audience: Orthopaedic surgery residents using topic-based study workflows
